trigger: Task Drift: Agent_Problem_Solver abandons the actual geometry optimization problem (smallest sphere containing rectangular boxes with given constraints) to solve an arbitrary irrelevant cubic equation, demonstrating reasoning-to-action mismatch; Verification Failure: Agent_Verifier skips its designated verification role and final synthesis, instead merely passing control to another agent without evaluating the solution; Context Carry-On Failure: Missing or misconfigured carry_data on edges (USER→Agent_Problem_Solver, Agent_Verifier→Agent_Code_Executor) causes task context loss, leading agents to request problem statement repeatedly or solve wrong problems
